title: [RJ330023] Seed of the Dead: Sweet Home v2.07
description:
We present you an ECSTASY FPS!

Prepare to Experience the Ultimate EX(Ecstasy)FPS.

To protect that cute girl you like from the zombies and other horrors ravaging the streets, it's time to unleash hell!

Heal with the injured heroines with sex!
Unload that magnum in your pants, and shoot from the hip! Send them into ecstasy!

What awaits you and the heroines in this new life in a destroyed world...!?


Post-apocalyptic Life in Hometown

Return from the battlefield to acquire your hard-earned items and points!
Items can help build new facilities, and points can buy you new skills, and more.
A glorious cycle of battling and town-building awaits!

You can also take the opportunity to get to know the heroines better in Hometown.
Listen to them. Give them presents to strengthen your bond.
Those bonds will surely pay dividends on the battlefield!


A Bit of Relaxation

When the heroines reach Ecstasy, you can trigger an event to deepen your bonds even further.
This is your chance to really get close to them!
Enjoy a variety of H scenes as you get friendly with the heroines.
You'll find some special events that only occur once you've sufficiently expanded your base, too.
